endure.label: Endure
endure.detail: No intervention — full catalog duration and penalties. Stockpiles untouched.

relief.label: Relief
relief.detail: Divert aid from the national stockpile: shorter crisis, softer happiness hit; extraction stays damaged.

rebuild.label: Rebuild
rebuild.detail: Spend stockpile on infrastructure crews: extraction recovers faster, workers are strained, crisis lasts a bit less.
